## 3. AI / Semiconductor

**HIGH:** U.S. regulators drafted rules requiring government approval to ship AI chips anywhere outside U.S.; would give U.S. control over AMD/NVIDIA global sales. **CONTRADICTS** ai_tech sleeve — export restrictions could throttle revenue growth for SOXQ, CHAT holdings. **NOVEL** (March 5 report).
